title: Family Feast 20% Off
desc: Get 20% discount on the Family Feast Combo. Valid on orders above ₹800.

title: Welcome Offer — 15% Off
desc: First time ordering? Get 15% off your entire first bill. No minimum order required!

title: Weekday Lunch Special
desc: 50% off on selected main course dishes from 12 PM to 3 PM on weekdays only.

title: Birthday Celebration 30% Off
desc: Celebrate your special day with us! Show your birthday proof and get 30% off the entire table.

title: Starter + Drink Combo at ₹199
desc: Any starter with a cold drink combo at a flat ₹199. Available for dine-in only.

title: Corporate Group 25% Off
desc: Groups of 10 or more get 25% off on pre-booked orders. Perfect for office lunches and parties.
